info.title: forceops
info.description:
By hook or by crook, perform operations on files and directories. If they are
            in use by a process, kill the process.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: By hook or by crook, perform operations on files and directories. If they are in use by a process, kill the process.

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete files or a directories recursively.

commands.name: list
commands.description: Uses LockCheck to output processes using a file or directory.

arguments.name: fileOrDirectory
arguments.description: File or directory to get the locks of.
